Methodology

Data Sources

Listings sourced from Craigslist Portland (apartments/housing for rent), filtered to 2+ bedrooms within a 3-mile radius of zip code 97202 in Inner SE Portland.

Internet availability checked at each specific street address using BroadbandNow.com's address-level lookup tool.

Scoring Rubric (0-100)

FactorWeightCriteria
Room Count20%2 rooms = 15pts, 3+ rooms = 20pts
Kitchen Quality15%Full kitchen = 15pts, kitchenette = 10pts
Powell/Division Proximity20%On corridor = 20pts, adjacent = 15pts, nearby = 10pts
Price15%<$1,800 = 15pts, $1,800-2,200 = 12pts, $2,200-2,800 = 8pts
Square Footage10%>900 sqft = 10pts, 700-900 = 7pts, <700 = 4pts
Mixed-Use Friendliness10%Live/work keywords = 10pts, townhouse = 7pts, none = 3pts
Fiber Internet10%Excellent (fiber) = 10pts, Good (cable) = 5pts

Target Neighborhoods

Hosford-Abernethy, Richmond, Creston-Kenilworth, Brooklyn, Buckman, and Sunnyside in Inner SE Portland.

Internet Classification

Excellent: Fiber available (940+ Mbps symmetric). Good: Gigabit cable (2 Gbps) but no fiber. Adequate: Cable <500 Mbps. Poor: DSL only.

Report generated March 27, 2026 at 06:53 PM. Data may change; verify listings and internet availability before signing a lease.
